SHIVANSH TIWARI

7607890012 — Noida, India

shivknp99@gmail.com — linkedin.com/in/shivansh-tiwari

PROFESSIONAL SUMMARY

Software Engineer with experience building scalable backend and data platforms using Python, SQL, and cloud-native services. Worked on ETL pipelines, analytics systems, and real-time collaborative applications. Strong in problem-solving, system design fundamentals, and writing production-grade code.

EXPERIENCE

Programmer Analyst Trainee

Cognizant Technology Solutions

May 2025 — Present Noida, India

Built and optimized SQL and Python-based data pipelines, improving reporting efficiency and reducing turnaround time.

e

e Developed automated dashboards and KPI reports, enabling faster data-driven decisions and reducing manual effort.

e Performed EDA and predictive analysis to identify trends and enhance operational accuracy.

e

Utilized Databricks for large-scale data transformation, improving scalability and processing performance.

PROJECTS

SyncForge — Real-time Collaborative IDE

Live

Built a real-time collaborative IDE for 10+ users using React, Node.js, WebSockets, WebRTC, and ShareDB erational Transformation) ensuring 95% conflict reduction.

e

(Op-

e

Implemented role-based authentication, integrated video/chat/screen sharing, and developed a Docker-based box for secure multi-language code execution.

HeartGuard — Cardiovascular Risk Assessment Platform React, Node.js, Python, Scikit-learn, MongoDB

e Developed a full-stack ML-driven health risk platform with automated PDF reporting and real-time data visualiza- tion dashboards.

Built and optimized ensemble models (Random Forest, SVM, KNN, Logistic Regression) achieving 92% accuracy with cross-validation and hyperparameter tuning.

e

EDUCATION

Bachelor of Computer Science, SRM University

2021 — 2025

CGPA: 9.07 / 10

SKILLS

Languages: Python, C++, JavaScript Backend: Node.js, REST APIs, JSON, API Integration Data: SQL, ETL Pipelines, Azure, Docker Databases: MySQL, Mongo DB Tools: Docker, Git
